summary: Initial MVP testing completed for Rare Shot Live Wallpaper app. Backend API fully functional (3/3 endpoints passing). Frontend loads correctly with splash screen, tab navigation, and most features working. Google Photos integration successful (34 photos loaded). Critical routing issue found in Effects tab.

integration_issues.issue: Effects tab does not navigate to /effects route. When clicking the Effects tab, the URL stays at /music (previous tab) instead of navigating to /effects. The Music screen content remains visible. All other tabs (Home, Photos, Videos, Music) navigate correctly to their respective routes.
integration_issues.reproduction: 1. Load app, 2. Click Music tab (navigates to /music), 3. Click Effects tab, 4. Observe: URL stays at /music, Music screen content still visible, Effects screen does not render

action_items: Fix Effects tab routing - ensure clicking Effects tab navigates to /effects route and renders EffectsScreen component
Verify Expo Router configuration for (tabs)/effects.tsx route
Test that effect selection buttons (Rain, Snow, Leaves, etc.) are visible and functional after routing fix
Test intensity selector appears when non-'none' effect is selected
critical_code_review_comments: Effects tab routing issue: The tab bar shows Effects tab as active but doesn't navigate to the effects screen. Check if (tabs)/effects.tsx is properly configured in Expo Router.
All other tabs (Home, Photos, Videos, Music) navigate correctly, suggesting the issue is specific to the Effects route.
Particle effects ARE working (visible on home screen as leaves/sparkles), so the ParticleSystem component is functional. The issue is only with the Effects tab UI for selecting effects.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. Using built-in wallpapers and Google Photos album.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend fully functional. Frontend mostly working except Effects tab routing. When retesting, focus on: 1) Effects tab navigation and content rendering, 2) Effect selection buttons functionality, 3) Intensity selector visibility. All other features (tabs, widget, settings, Google Photos, music) are working correctly.
rca_of_issue:
Root Cause Analysis - Effects Tab Routing Issue:

Reproduction Steps:
1. Load app at https://russian-translator-5.preview.emergentagent.com
2. Wait for splash screen to complete (3 seconds)
3. Click on 'Effects' tab in bottom navigation
4. Observe: Tab highlights but screen content doesn't change
5. URL remains at '/' instead of navigating to effects route

Expected Behavior:
- Clicking Effects tab should navigate to /effects route
- EffectsScreen component should render with effect selection grid
- Effect buttons (None, Rain, Snow, Leaves, Sparkles, Bubbles, Fireflies, Petals) should be visible
- Intensity selector should appear when non-'none' effect is selected

Actual Behavior:
- Effects tab highlights in tab bar
- URL stays at '/'
- Home screen wallpaper remains visible
- No effect selection UI appears

Potential Causes:
1. Expo Router configuration issue in (tabs)/_layout.tsx
2. Effects screen component not properly exported or imported
3. Route name mismatch between tab definition and file name
4. Conditional rendering preventing effects screen from showing

Mitigation:
- Verify (tabs)/effects.tsx file exists and exports default component
- Check Tabs.Screen configuration for 'effects' route in (tabs)/_layout.tsx
- Ensure route name matches file name convention
- Test navigation programmatically using router.push('/effects')
